# Phase 5 many-missing fixture

Four Completed phases all MISSING. Backfill MUST cluster 1-3 Completed
phases per backfill phase (per AC-5.4) -- never one mega-phase. With 4
sources, we expect 2 backfill phases (3 + 1 cluster split).
